hero.thesis: Senior PMs constantly seek high-quality insights to stay ahead in their careers. A curated newsletter delivers this efficiently.
hero.marketSize: There are 400,000 Senior+ PMs globally, with a growing trend in digital content consumption.
hero.payingEvidence: Similar newsletters like 'Product Pulse' charge $15/month with 3,000 subscribers.

ninetyDay.title: Foundation & Planning

actions.action: Define your unique value proposition and target audience profile. Use Notion to document.
actions.success: You have a clear one-sentence value prop and a Notion page with audience details.

actions.action: Set up your newsletter on beehiiv; choose a clean, professional template.
actions.success: Your newsletter platform is configured and ready for content.

actions.action: Join three relevant Discord communities like 'PM Hive', 'Product Masters', 'Roadmap Gurus'.
actions.success: Active membership in three PM-focused communities.

actions.action: Research and outline your first newsletter issue. Focus on a trending PM topic.
actions.success: An outline with three major sections completed in Notion.

actions.action: Draft and review your first issue. Use Grammarly for editing.
actions.success: A polished draft of your first newsletter issue.

ninetyDay.metric: Newsletter platform set up and first issue drafted.

ninetyDay.title: First Issue & Initial Outreach

actions.action: Finalize and schedule your first newsletter issue to send on Wednesday.
actions.success: First newsletter issue ready and scheduled in beehiiv.

actions.action: Compile a list of 50 potential subscribers from LinkedIn searches (e.g., 'Senior PM' + 'Tech').
actions.success: A list of 50 potential subscribers compiled in a spreadsheet.

actions.action: Send first newsletter issue. Post about it in the Discord communities.
actions.success: First issue sent and promoted in three Discord communities.

actions.action: Cold email the 50 potential subscribers with a value-focused introduction.
actions.success: 50 personalized cold emails sent.

actions.action: Engage in conversations on Reddit's r/ProductManagement with insights from your newsletter.
actions.success: At least two meaningful conversations started on Reddit.

ninetyDay.metric: First newsletter issue sent and 50 cold emails dispatched.

ninetyDay.title: Refinement & Feedback

actions.action: Analyze opening and click-through rates from the first issue in beehiiv analytics.
actions.success: Detailed analytics report for first issue created.

actions.action: Survey initial subscribers for feedback using Typeform.
actions.success: Typeform survey sent to all subscribers with a 20% response rate.

actions.action: Refine newsletter content based on feedback and analytics.
actions.success: Improved content strategy documented in Notion.

actions.action: Write and draft your second newsletter issue.
actions.success: Draft of second newsletter issue completed.

actions.action: Engage with feedback responders personally via email or LinkedIn.
actions.success: Personal interactions with at least 10 subscribers.

ninetyDay.metric: Feedback collected and used to refine the newsletter.

ninetyDay.title: Growing Your Subscriber Base

actions.action: Identify and join two additional LinkedIn groups focused on product management.
actions.success: Membership in two new LinkedIn PM groups.

actions.action: Create a promotional post offering a sneak peek of your newsletter in these LinkedIn groups.
actions.success: Promotional post shared in two groups.

actions.action: Schedule and send your second newsletter issue.
actions.success: Second issue sent to subscribers.

actions.action: Host a small virtual meetup for PMs via Zoom to discuss newsletter topics.
actions.success: Virtual meetup planned with at least five RSVPs.

actions.action: Follow up with meetup attendees for feedback and potential subscriptions.
actions.success: Feedback from at least five meetup attendees collected.

ninetyDay.metric: Second newsletter issue sent and virtual meetup hosted.

ninetyDay.title: Increasing Engagement

actions.action: Analyze engagement metrics from the second issue and virtual meetup.
actions.success: Detailed report on engagement metrics created.

actions.action: Develop a referral program for current subscribers to invite peers.
actions.success: Referral program details documented in Notion.

actions.action: Draft and send a third newsletter issue.
actions.success: Third issue drafted and scheduled.

actions.action: Promote the referral program through your newsletter and social channels.
actions.success: Referral program details communicated to all subscribers.

actions.action: Continue engaging in LinkedIn and Reddit communities with newsletter insights.
actions.success: At least two new discussions started in communities.

ninetyDay.metric: Third newsletter issue sent and referral program launched.

actions.action: Research competitors' pricing and value propositions to benchmark your offering.
actions.success: Competitive pricing analysis completed.

actions.action: Define your tiered pricing strategy in Notion.
actions.success: Three-tier pricing strategy documented.

actions.action: Draft an email to current subscribers introducing a premium offering.
actions.success: Email draft ready for premium offering launch.

actions.action: Launch a premium subscription offering with an early-bird discount.
actions.success: Premium offering launched with a clear pricing page in beehiiv.

actions.action: Host a live Q&A on Zoom about the benefits of the premium offering.
actions.success: Live Q&A hosted with at least five attendees.

ninetyDay.title: Expanding Content & Reach

actions.action: Identify two guest writers for your newsletter and reach out via LinkedIn.
actions.success: Two guest writers identified and contacted.

actions.action: Plan a content calendar for the next month using Notion.
actions.success: Content calendar finalized for the next month.

actions.action: Draft and send the fourth newsletter issue.
actions.success: Fourth issue drafted and scheduled.

actions.action: Promote guest writer contributions in PM communities.
actions.success: Guest contributions promoted in at least three communities.

actions.action: Evaluate the effectiveness of the referral program.
actions.success: Referral program performance report created.

ninetyDay.metric: Fourth newsletter issue sent and guest writers secured.

ninetyDay.title: Optimizing Operations

actions.action: Set up automations for newsletter sending and subscriber management using n8n.
actions.success: Basic automations for newsletter operations in place.

actions.action: Refine onboarding emails for new subscribers using ConvertKit.
actions.success: Onboarding email sequence revised and improved.

actions.action: Draft and send the fifth newsletter issue.
actions.success: Fifth issue drafted and scheduled.

actions.action: Analyze the impact of guest writer contributions.
actions.success: Analysis report on guest writer impact created.

actions.action: Engage with at least five subscribers for testimonials.
actions.success: Five subscriber testimonials collected.

ninetyDay.metric: Fifth newsletter issue sent and automations implemented.

ninetyDay.title: Building Brand Authority

actions.action: Host an online panel discussion with senior PMs on trending topics.
actions.success: Panel discussion planned with at least three speakers.

actions.action: Promote the panel discussion across all channels including Discord and LinkedIn.
actions.success: Panel discussion promoted in five channels.

actions.action: Draft and send the sixth newsletter issue.
actions.success: Sixth issue drafted and scheduled.

actions.action: Follow up with panel attendees for feedback and subscriptions.
actions.success: Feedback from at least ten panel attendees collected.

actions.action: Create a case study from the panel discussion for your newsletter.
actions.success: Case study drafted and included in content pipeline.

ninetyDay.metric: Sixth newsletter issue sent and panel discussion hosted.

ninetyDay.title: Scaling Subscription Base

actions.action: Plan a paid social media campaign targeting PMs on LinkedIn.
actions.success: Paid campaign strategy documented.

actions.action: Draft and send the seventh newsletter issue.
actions.success: Seventh issue drafted and scheduled.

actions.action: Launch the LinkedIn ad campaign for your newsletter.
actions.success: Ad campaign launched on LinkedIn.

actions.action: Monitor ad performance and adjust targeting as needed.
actions.success: Ad performance monitored and adjustments made.

actions.action: Analyze subscription growth from the ad campaign.
actions.success: Subscription growth report from ad campaign created.

ninetyDay.metric: Seventh newsletter issue sent and ad campaign launched.

ninetyDay.title: Enhancing Subscriber Experience

actions.action: Survey your subscribers for content preferences and feature requests.
actions.success: Subscriber survey launched with at least a 20% response rate.

actions.action: Draft and send the eighth newsletter issue.
actions.success: Eighth issue drafted and scheduled.

actions.action: Implement quick wins based on survey feedback.
actions.success: At least two subscriber suggestions implemented.

actions.action: Host a feedback session with top subscribers via Zoom.
actions.success: Feedback session hosted with at least five attendees.

actions.action: Create a roadmap for future content and features in Notion.
actions.success: Future roadmap created with clear timelines.

ninetyDay.metric: Eighth newsletter issue sent and subscriber feedback integrated.

ninetyDay.title: Review & Strategic Planning

actions.action: Analyze all engagement and subscription metrics from the past month.
actions.success: Comprehensive analysis report created.

actions.action: Draft and send the ninth newsletter issue.
actions.success: Ninth issue drafted and scheduled.

actions.action: Plan content and marketing strategy for the next quarter.
actions.success: Quarterly strategy documented in Notion.

actions.action: Communicate upcoming changes and features to subscribers.
actions.success: Email sent detailing future plans to subscribers.

actions.action: Celebrate your achievements and plan for scaling your operations.
actions.success: Reflection session completed with clear next steps for scaling.

ninetyDay.metric: Ninth newsletter issue sent and strategic plan developed.

toolStack.name: beehiiv
toolStack.why: For creating and managing your newsletter effectively.
toolStack.pricing: Free to start, paid plans from $29/month.

toolStack.name: Notion
toolStack.why: To organize content and manage your project plans.
toolStack.pricing: Free for personal use, team plans from $8/month.

toolStack.name: Grammarly
toolStack.why: To ensure your content is polished and error-free.

toolStack.name: Typeform
toolStack.why: To gather structured feedback from subscribers.
toolStack.pricing: Free with limited features, premium from $35/month.

toolStack.name: ConvertKit
toolStack.why: For managing email sequences and automations.
toolStack.pricing: Free up to 1,000 subscribers, paid plans from $29/month.

toolStack.name: n8n
toolStack.why: To automate repetitive tasks within your newsletter operations.
toolStack.pricing: Free for personal use, paid plans available.

toolStack.name: Zoom
toolStack.why: To host virtual meetups and panel discussions.
toolStack.pricing: Free basic plan, pro plans from $14.99/month.

firstTenCustomers.script:
Hi [Name],

I'm launching a high-signal newsletter tailored for Senior PMs like you, focused on delivering actionable insights weekly. Would you be interested in a sneak peek of [Niche]? Let me know, and I can send over the first issue!

Best,
[Your Name]
firstTenCustomers.cadence: Send the initial email on Tuesday, follow up on Thursday, and a final nudge the following Monday.

pricing.starter: $10/month for basic access to weekly insights.
pricing.growth: $25/month for additional resources and quarterly reports.
pricing.raisingRules: Increase prices by 15% every 6 months as you add more value and content.

failureModes: Unclear value proposition: Subscribers don't know why they should stay.
Poor content quality: Drives subscribers away.
Lack of engagement: Newsletter becomes a one-way street.
Ineffective onboarding: New subscribers drop off quickly.
Neglecting community involvement: Reduces word-of-mouth growth.

setup.llc: Use Stripe Atlas to set up an LLC efficiently.
setup.payments: Integrate Stripe for seamless payment processing.
setup.contracts: Develop a simple subscriber agreement using Lovable.
setup.insurance: Consider business liability insurance once revenue exceeds $1,000/month.

scaling: To transition from a solo operation to a small team, start by hiring a part-time virtual assistant to manage routine tasks such as subscriber management and basic customer service. This allows you to focus on high-value activities like content creation and strategic planning. As your subscriber base grows, consider employing a freelance writer to contribute additional content or guest posts, which will diversify your newsletter and relieve some of the writing burden. For tech and automation needs, a part-time technical assistant can help optimize and maintain your tool stack, ensuring smooth operations as your newsletter scales. Remember, each hire should align with a clear need and be justifiable by the additional value they bring to your operations.
